title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 10 - 2017: at the top of the Great Pyramid of Giza at 30th and Arapahoe

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog recapping his day in Boulder. He spent the day at his mom's house doing car maintenance — draining and refilling oil after accidentally mixing fluids, filling fluids, replacing windshield wipers, and touching up silver paint. He also came home and organized his room, electrical setup, and kitchen, and plans to shampoo the car and list it for sale the next day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Looks really good from a distance and he's pleased with how it turned out
Wants to keep shampooing until the carpet looks fully black again before selling

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle got really high and decided to organize his room.

claims.subject: Kyle's mom
claims.claim: Kyle's mom called and asked him to come over to her house and clean up his car.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle checked the oil levels in his car because he never just takes his car without checking.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle poured oil into his car but realized he was pouring it into the wrong place because it was the same color as the oil.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle drove to a car parts place and got 5 quarts of oil for his car.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle drained all the oil out of his car and then put 5 quarts of new oil in.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle filled up his power steering fluid but isn't sure if he filled it completely.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle put new windshield wipers on his car but needs to adjust them.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle painted his car silver and thinks it looks really good from a distance.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle organized his room and the electrical stuff around the console.

claims.subject: Kyle's deck
claims.claim: Kyle organized his deck and fixed a cracked rocket box that fell off.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle plans to shampoo his car tomorrow to make it look really black.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle didn't use detergent while shampooing his car, and the water kept coming up.

claims.subject: Kyle's car
claims.claim: Kyle plans to shampoo his car until it looks really black and might use white paint for wet edges.

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, B-Log, for the 10th of February. It's 1.55 a.m. I let too much time go by. I need to go to bed now. It's because I guess I wasn't that tired. I just got really high.
So today, I got up, and I think I wanted to organize my room, but my mom called, and she wanted me to come over to her house and clean up my car, so I did that.
But I went over there, and I wanted to check levels first, because I never touched my car. As soon as I drove my car, the oil light went on.
And I got home, I got there, and then I was like, okay, let me check the levels. I wanted to put more oil in the car, like, right away.
And so I grabbed the oil, and I poured it in, and then as it was pouring in, I looked at it, and it said, power steering crew, because it was in the same exact color as an oil.
And it was the same shape.

I borrowed my mom's car, and drove over to the car parts place, and got five quarts of oil in an oil pan, and drained all the oil out, and then put five quarts in, four, and then poured the oil from the pan into the quarts, and filled up four quarts, so there were four quarts.

So, then I filled up my power steering, that was squeaky, and I filled up my, or, I don't know if I filled it, I topped it off, but I filled up my front windshield washing foot, and I was good at buy more, but I forgot.

So, I was trying to buy more oil, and then put that in, top it off the front and back, but I have to buy a cork for the back, because I lost the original, you know, screw, and so we bought a cork, and I lost that, so I have to buy another one of those, too.
And, um, I put new windshield wipers on today, but I need to adjust them tomorrow, so I don't know if I have to get one for the rear.

So, I went over there today, and after I did that, I went and painted my car around the paint, the silver, didn't finish that until I finished, until I ran out of paint, but I didn't actually finish, so I don't know, hopefully, I think I'll just leave it.
Um, but it looks really good from afar, you know, I pin it on, so, but I like the look of it.
Hmm.
Hmm.
Um, yeah, but I like to go all day, and then I came back here, and I organized my room, and I finally organized, yeah, around the electrical stuff around my couch, I'll show that.
And then, uh, the deck, organized, begin to organize the deck, and I'll finish that tomorrow.
Hmm, I was usually fixing my rocket box, too.
Um, it's cracked, because it fell off when I was driving.
Yeah, so, that's what I'll do tomorrow, and, uh, and then organize the kitchen, and then maybe, yeah, tomorrow.
Yeah, that's what I want to do tomorrow.
Uh, put the car on sale on my website, uh, and then all, all the other websites.
Hmm.
And, um, uh, shampoo the car tomorrow.
I did one, like, full day of shampooing, but when I was shampooing, I wasn't putting any detergent in it,
And every single time, the water came up black.
You can hear the, um, shade banging against the window.
I guess I'm going to do a swindy head.
What was I talking about?
Uh, yeah.
Oh, yeah, yeah.
Oh, yeah, so it's black, so I'm going to go back there and just keep, um, shampooing until it stops being black,
And it'll look really good.
Um, and I think I even have more touch-up, white paint.
Hmm.
So, I'm just selling the car, okay.
That's enough talking.
Oof, I shouldn't wait until this long next time.
